notableEvents.label: Freddie Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Freddie Freeman grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Shohei Ohtani out at 2nd. Freddie Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Will Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Smith lines out to right fielder Esteury Ruiz.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas grounds out, third baseman Graham Pauley to first baseman Connor Norby.

notableEvents.label: Freddie Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dodgers challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Freddie Freeman grounds into an unassisted double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards. Shohei Ohtani out at 1st. Freddie Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Freddie Freeman rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dodgers challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Freddie Freeman grounds into an unassisted double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards. Shohei Ohtani out at 1st. Freddie Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Esteury Ruiz batting, Graham Pauley picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Alex Freeland.

notableEvents.label: Javier Sanoja pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja pops out to shortstop Hyeseong Kim.

notableEvents.label: Javier Sanoja pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja singles on a pop up to second baseman Alex Freeland. Xavier Edwards scores.
